summary: Iteration 99 - Critical Bug Fix Verified: Farmers registered by agents now appear in my-farmers. All 8 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI tests PASSED. The fix correctly creates coop_member AND adds to agent's assigned_farmers list for both online (register-web) and offline (sync/upload) registration flows.
critical_code_review_comments: register-web endpoint (ussd.py lines 2357-2460) correctly creates coop_member and adds to agent's assigned_farmers when agent_id is provided
sync/upload register_farmer handler (agent_search.py lines 684-739) correctly creates coop_member and adds to agent's assigned_farmers
my-farmers endpoint (field_agent_dashboard.py lines 369-500) correctly returns farmers from agent's assigned_farmers list
Frontend AgentRegistrationForm (AgentTerrainDashboard.jsx line 308) correctly sends agent_id with registration request
seed_data_creation: Test farmers created during testing: TEST_Planteur_TORU, TEST_Planteur_ACIP, TEST_FrontendPlanteur_7834 (all assigned to test agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The critical bug fix is verified working. Test agent now has 5 assigned farmers. When registering farmers via agent (online or offline), they are correctly added to coop_members AND the agent's assigned_farmers list, making them visible in the Planteurs tab.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: When an agent registers a farmer, the farmer was created in ussd_registrations but NOT in coop_members, and NOT added to the agent's assigned_farmers list
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: register-web now creates coop_member + assigns to agent. Sync handler register_farmer also creates coop_member + assigns to agent
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Farmers registered by agents now correctly appear in my-farmers list
